title: synth_xilinx error in simple demo
body:
### Version

0.47

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/172f4612-1970-457e-b6a8-cdb4e65a31b7)

command: `yosys  -p "synth_xilinx -flatten -nowidelut -arch xc7 -top top; json -o synth.json top;" top.v`

top.v

```
module top(
    input wire clk,  
    input key1,
    output led  
);
    FDRE fdre_inst2(
        .C(clk),
        .D(~key1),
        .CE(1'b1),
        .Q(led)
    );

endmodule
```



### Expected Behavior

no

### Actual Behavior

no
